channel.title: SIEAP Insights
channel.description: Startup evaluation, investment frameworks, and building trust in India's ecosystem.

item.title: Why We Published Our Evaluation Framework
item.description: Most platforms hide their scoring. We published ours — all 100 points, 5 pillars, 27 sub-parameters.

item.title: SIEAP Scores Bronze on Its Own Scorecard
item.description: We scored ourselves 35-45. Bronze tier. Pre-revenue, three-person team. Publishing it openly.

item.title: The 100-Point Scorecard: 27 Parameters, 5 Pillars, One Score
item.description: How SIEAP evaluates startups — every pillar, every parameter, stage-calibrated weights explained.

item.title: 5 Red Flags That Get a Startup Instantly Rejected
item.description: Not every startup makes it through SIEAP's evaluation. Here are the 5 automatic deal-breakers.
